name: Door County YMCA - Fish Creek
description: Door County YMCA - Fish Creek is a place to play pickleball in Fish Creek, WI. There are 2 indoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A membership is required to play.

name: Door County YMCA - Sturgeon Bay
description: Door County YMCA - Sturgeon Bay is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Sturgeon Bay, WI. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Maxwelton Braes Lodge
description: Maxwelton Braes Lodge is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Baileys Harbor, WI. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Sevastopol Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at Sevastopol Pickleball in Sturgeon Bay, WI! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available.

name: Sister Bay Sports Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Sister Bay Sports Complex in Sister Bay, WI! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Sunset Park Pickleball Complex
description: Sunset Park Pickleball Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Sturgeon Bay, WI. There are 7 outdoor acrylic and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, lights, and trainers or lessons.

name: The Lodge at Leathem Smith
description: The Lodge at Leathem Smith is a place to play pickleball in Sturgeon Bay, WI. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Washington Island, Door County
description: Courts are located behind the school and rec center on the curve at Lakeview. All supplies, courts and windscreens paid by donations. Please donate to help. The supply box has paddles, balls, nets, brooms, squeegee, first aid. Please enjoy and then be sure to return it all into the box. The lock combo is: BALL. And then a blank space on the padlock.
